user_query:
I run a homeschooling blog and took rough notes during our co-op planning meeting. Please do three things using the files in this workspace:

1) Inspect configuration: Read site/_config.yml to obtain:
   - url (base site URL)
   - permalink pattern
   - allowed_categories
   - allowed_tags
   You must use these values when creating the post and computing the link.

2) Create a polished meeting recap post from content/drafts/co-op-planning-notes.md and save it to output/posts/2024-09-14-co-op-planning-meeting.md with YAML front matter and a structured body. Requirements:
   - Front matter must include: title, date, categories, tags.
   - title: "Co-op Planning Meeting (Sept 14, 2024)"
   - date: Use the meeting date from the notes (2024-09-14).
   - categories: exactly ["co-op"], and confirm it exists in allowed_categories.
   - tags: choose at least two that reflect the content (e.g., planning, schedules, volunteer, budgeting), and ensure every tag is in allowed_tags.
   - Body sections (use these headings in this order if content exists):
       Overview (1 paragraph),
       Decisions (bulleted),
       Action Items (bulleted, include Owner and Due date per item),
       Deferred Items (bulleted),
       Next Meeting (line with date/time if present in the notes).
   - Include every DECISION, ACTION (with owner and due date), and DEFERRED item that appears in the notes.

   Compute the absolute URL to the post from url and the permalink pattern in site/_config.yml, using the slug "co-op-planning-meeting" with the date 2024/09/14. Do not hardcode the base URL; derive it from the config. You do not need to include a permalink field in the front matter, but you must use the computed link in step 3 and when appending to the notes.

3) Draft an email to co-op parents and append a link to the notes:
   - Create output/email/co-op-parents-2024-09-14.txt with:
     Subject: Recap: Co-op Planning Meeting (Sept 14, 2024)
     Body: a 1-sentence overview, followed by a bulleted list of the action items (each with Owner and Due), and the final bullet should be "Full recap:" followed by the absolute URL computed from the config.
     The email must list exactly the same number of action items as appear in the notes, with matching owners and due dates.
   - Edit content/drafts/co-op-planning-notes.md by appending, at the very end of the file, a new section starting with a heading line "Publishing" and a single line: "Cleaned summary posted: <absolute URL>" using the same computed link. Do not modify any of the original notes above the new section.

Constraints and checks:
- Use only categories and tags allowed by site/_config.yml.
- The post must include all DECISION and DEFERRED items found in the notes.
- The email and post must agree on the count and details of action items (owner and due dates).
- Do not use the Internet; rely only on the provided files.

Input paths:
- site/_config.yml
- content/drafts/co-op-planning-notes.md

Output paths to create:
- output/posts/2024-09-14-co-op-planning-meeting.md
- output/email/co-op-parents-2024-09-14.txt
- content/drafts/co-op-planning-notes.md (appended Publishing section)
 All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
